---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
# Load and plot
library(quantmod)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)
library(e1071)
SPX <- getSymbols("^SPX",env=NULL ) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("date") %>% dplyr::select(date, SPX.Adjusted)
VIX <- getSymbols("^VIX",env=NULL ) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("date") %>% dplyr::select(date, VIX.Adjusted)
VIX3M <- getSymbols("^VIX3M",env=NULL ) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("date") %>% dplyr::select(date, VIX3M.Adjusted)
df_wide <- Reduce(function(...) full_join(..., by = "date"), list(SPX, VIX, VIX3M)) %>% mutate(date=as.Date(date))
df_long <- df_wide %>% 
    pivot_longer(cols = -date, names_to = "ticker") %>% 
    mutate(ticker=sub(".Adjusted", "", ticker), date=as.Date(date))
df_long <- df_long %>% arrange(date) %>% mutate(wday = lubridate::wday(date, label = TRUE)) %>% group_by(ticker) %>% 
    mutate(ret = c(0, diff(log(value)))) %>% ungroup
df_long %>% ggplot(aes(x=date,y=value,color=ticker,group=ticker)) + geom_line() + scale_color_colorblind()

```
```{r}
df_long %>% group_by(wday, ticker) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(wday, ymin=M-S*2, ymax=M+S*2)) + geom_point(aes(y=M), size=0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25) + facet_wrap(~ticker, scales="free") + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype="dashed", color="red")

df_cond_1 <- df_long %>% group_by(ticker) %>% 
    mutate(
        prev_1 = lag(ret, 1),
        prev_2 = lag(ret, 2),
        condition = factor(case_when(
            prev_1 < 0 ~ "down",
            prev_1 > 0 ~ "up",
            TRUE ~ NA
        ))
)

df_cond_1 %>% filter(wday=="Tue" & ticker == "SPX") %>% group_by(condition) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(condition, ymin=M-S*2, ymax=M+S*2)) + geom_point(aes(y=M), size=0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype="dashed", color="red")

df_cond_2 <- df_long %>% group_by(ticker) %>% 
    mutate(
        prev_1 = lag(ret, 1),
        prev_2 = lag(ret, 2),
        condition = factor(case_when(
            prev_1 < 0 & prev_2 < 0 ~ "down_down",
            prev_1 < 0 & prev_2 > 0 ~ "up_down",
            prev_1 > 0 & prev_2 < 0 ~ "down_up",
            prev_1 > 0 & prev_2 > 0 ~ "up_up",
            TRUE ~ NA
        ))
)

df_cond_2 %>% filter(wday=="Tue" & ticker == "SPX") %>% group_by(condition) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(condition, ymin=M-S*2, ymax=M+S*2)) + geom_point(aes(y=M), size=0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype="dashed", color="red")

```

```{r}
df_wide <- df_wide %>% mutate(contango = lag(VIX.Adjusted / VIX3M.Adjusted), contango_n = ntile(contango, 10))
df_contango <- full_join(df_cond_2, df_wide %>% dplyr::select(date, contango_n), by="date")
df_contango %>% filter(wday=="Tue" & ticker == "SPX") %>% group_by(condition, contango_n) %>% 
    reframe(M = mean(ret, na.rm=T), S = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n())) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(contango_n, ymin=M-S*2, ymax=M+S*2)) + geom_point(aes(y=M), size=0.5) + geom_errorbar(width=0.25) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype="dashed", color="red")     + facet_wrap(~condition)
```


```{r}
years <- (df_cond_1$date %>% unique %>% length) / 252
df_cond_1 %>% filter(ticker == "SPX" & wday == "Tue") %>% group_by(condition) %>% 
    reframe(SR = mean(ret, na.rm=T)/sd(ret, na.rm=T)*sqrt(52), N=n()/years)
df_long  %>% filter(ticker == "SPX")  %>% pull(ret) %>% skewness(na.rm=T)
df_long  %>% filter(ticker == "SPX")  %>% group_by(wday) %>% reframe(Skew = skewness(ret, na.rm=T))
```


```{r}
df_cond_1 %>% filter(ticker == "SPX" & wday == "Tue") %>% group_by(condition) %>% 
    mutate(eq = cumsum(ret %>% replace_na(0))) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(date, eq, color=condition)) + geom_line() +theme(text = element_text(size=12)) + scale_color_colorblind() #+facet_wrap(~Year, scales="free")

df_cond_2 %>% filter(ticker == "SPX" & wday == "Tue") %>% group_by(condition) %>% 
    mutate(eq = cumsum(ret %>% replace_na(0))) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(date, eq, color=condition)) + geom_line() +theme(text = element_text(size=12)) + scale_color_colorblind()
```
